negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_004
prompt: The video opens with a scene set in a spacious, sunlit plaza in front of an opulent, white, classical-style building, likely a palace or government edifice, adorned with columns and intricate architectural details. Two individuals walk across the frame from left to right; one is wearing a light-colored top with floral patterns and dark pants, while the other is dressed in a bright blue polo shirt and light-colored jeans. In the background, two mounted police officers on brown horses are positioned, facing forward, with their horses standing still. The officers are dressed in dark uniforms and helmets, and the horses are equipped with saddles and reins. The plaza is paved with large stones, and several lampposts with decorative designs line the area. A few other pedestrians can be seen in the distance, some walking and others standing, contributing to the lively atmosphere of the public square. As the video progresses, the two individuals in the foreground continue walking, gradually moving out of the frame. The mounted police officers on horseback remain stationary, maintaining their positions in the background. The officers' posture suggests they are on patrol, observing the surroundings. The overall scene remains dynamic yet orderly, with the movement of people and the presence of the mounted police adding a sense of security and activity to the setting. By the final frame, the two individuals have moved further away, and the focus shifts more towards the mounted police officers, who continue to stand guard in their positions.  A medium shot captures the interaction between the two individuals and the mounted police officers, emphasizing the contrast between the casual pedestrians and the formal presence of the officers. The background architecture and lampposts add depth and context to the scene, enhancing the visual appeal and providing a sense of place.
